steps.title: Recognize what 'methodology' means
steps.content: The question asks for research “methodology”—how the study was structured and conducted, not what was discovered or what the researchers wanted to find.

steps.title: Select the choice describing the experimental procedure
steps.content: Choice A is the only choice that describes the experimental design: testing two groups of 125 seeds, one ingested and one not. The other three either state the research goal (B) or report findings/results (C, D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
